title: ¡Olé... Cuba!
overview: When a Spaniard decides to illegally enter La Habana by swimming, two rogues help him to find work in a sugar mill, where the emigrant falls in love with the daughter of the owner of the cane plantation.

trailers.title: Tres patines cantando y bailando Ole Cuba 1957
